branding.khmer_name: វិទ្យាស្ថានអាស៊ី កម្ពុជា
branding.motto_kh: សីលធម៌ បញ្ញា នវានុវត្តន៍ សហគ្រិនភាព

text.kh: ដាក់ពាក្យឥឡូវនេះ
ផតថលនិស្សិត

home_page.purpose: Serve as the primary portal representing the Asian Institute of Cambodia, projecting brand values of Morality, Intelligence, Innovation, and Entrepreneurship.
home_page.target_audience: Prospective Students, Parents, Current Students, and Partners.
home_page.page_goal: Establish institutional prestige, drive admissions inquiries, highlight scholarship conditions, and guide visitors to key academic offerings.
home_page.seo_title: Asian Institute of Cambodia | Leading University in Phnom Penh & Provinces
home_page.seo_description: Welcome to the Asian Institute of Cambodia (AIC). Offering high-quality Master, Bachelor, Associate, and TVET programs across 5 campuses. Secure up to 100% scholarships.

hero_section_content.headline_en: Building Leaders of Tomorrow with Morality and Innovation
hero_section_content.headline_kh: កសាងអ្នកដឹកនាំថ្ងៃស្អែកប្រកបដោយសីលធម៌ និងនវានុវត្តន៍
hero_section_content.subheadline_en: Explore accredited Master's, Bachelor's, Associate's, and TVET programs tailored for regional and global employability.
hero_section_content.subheadline_kh: ស្វែងយល់ពីកម្មវិធីសិក្សាថ្នាក់បរិញ្ញាបត្រជាន់ខ្ពស់ បរិញ្ញាបត្រ បរិញ្ញាបត្ររង និង TVET ដែលស្របតាមតម្រូវការទីផ្សារការងារជាតិ និងអន្តរជាតិ។

text.kh: ដាក់ពាក្យចូលរៀន
ស្វែងយល់ពីកម្មវិធីសិក្សា

label.kh: សាខាទូទាំងប្រទេសកម្ពុជា
ឱកាសទទួលបានអាហារូបករណ៍ ១០០%
ប្រាក់ខែដំបូងពេលចុះកម្មសិក្សា
គ្រឹះស្ថានដៃគូសហប្រតិបត្តិការអន្តរជាតិ

sections.name: University Overview
sections.objective: Introduce the history, core motto, and reach of AIC.

headline_example.kh: អំពីវិទ្យាស្ថានអាស៊ី កម្ពុជា

content_example.en: AIC is a premier higher education institution in Cambodia, providing career-focused education across five regional campuses: Phnom Penh, Kratie, Mondulkiri, Ratanakiri, and Stung Treng. We instill moral value, intelligence, and business-focused capability to ensure our students excel in any market.
content_example.kh: វិទ្យាស្ថានអាស៊ី កម្ពុជា គឺជាគ្រឹះស្ថានឧត្តមសិក្សាឈានមុខគេមួយនៅក្នុងប្រទេសកម្ពុជា ដោយផ្តល់ជូននូវការអប់រំតម្រង់ទិសអាជីពនៅតាមបណ្តាសាខាទាំង៥៖ ភ្នំពេញ ក្រចេះ មណ្ឌលគិរី រតនគិរី និងស្ទឹងត្រែង។ យើងបណ្តុះបណ្តាលសីលធម៌ បញ្ញា និងសមត្ថភាពអាជីវកម្ម ដើម្បីធានាថាជោគជ័យគ្រប់វិស័យ។

sections.ux_recommendations: Split-grid layout. Right side: dynamic video showcase of the Phnom Penh campus. Left side: core text with clean spacing and subtle icons for values.

text.kh: អានសារលិខិតនាយកវិទ្យាស្ថាន

sections.name: Why Choose Us
sections.objective: List key benefits such as jobs, international exposure, and practical focus.

headline_example.en: The AIC Edge for Career Success
headline_example.kh: ចំណុចខ្លាំងរបស់ AIC សម្រាប់ជោគជ័យក្នុងអាជីព

content_example.en: With partner networks in Japan, China, and Europe, our graduates qualify for jobs with monthly salaries between $300 to $1,000 locally, and up to $2,500 in Japan.
content_example.kh: តាមរយៈបណ្តាញដៃគូនៅប្រទេសជប៉ុន ចិន និងអឺរ៉ុប និស្សិតដែលបញ្ចប់ការសិក្សាពីយើងអាចទទួលបានការងារដែលមានប្រាក់ខែចាប់ពី $300 ដល់ $1,000 ក្នុងស្រុក និងរហូតដល់ $2,500 នៅប្រទេសជប៉ុន។

sections.ux_recommendations: A 3-card horizontal grid highlighting: 1. Practical Internships, 2. International Partnerships, 3. Guaranteed Placements.

text.kh: ស្វែងយល់បន្ថែមអំពីឱកាសការងារ

sections.name: Academic Programs Overview
sections.objective: Introduce Master, Bachelor, Associate, and TVET programs.

headline_example.kh: កម្រិតសិក្សារបស់យើង

content_example.en: Select from our range of programs customized to fit your schedule: morning, afternoon, evening, or weekend options.
content_example.kh: ជ្រើសរើសពីជម្រើសសិក្សាដ៏សម្បូរបែបដែលត្រូវនឹងពេលវេលារបស់អ្នក៖ វេនព្រឹក រសៀល យប់ ឬ ថ្ងៃសៅរ៍-អាទិត្យ។

sections.ux_recommendations: Interactive tabbed interface. Tabs for Master, Bachelor, Associate, and TVET. Each tab displays a brief details block and button linking to the route.

text.kh: មើលរចនាសម្ព័ន្ធកម្មវិធីសិក្សា

sections.name: Scholarships Banner

headline_example.kh: ឱកាសអាហារូបករណ៍ ១០០%

content_example.en: Get 100% scholarship coverage, complimentary student dormitory lodging in regional hubs, and global study tours when you pass your entry evaluation.
content_example.kh: ទទួលបានអាហារូបករណ៍រហូតដល់ ១០០% រួមជាមួយការស្នាក់នៅអន្តេវាសិកដ្ឋានដោយឥតគិតថ្លៃ និងឱកាសទស្សនកិច្ចសិក្សានៅក្រៅប្រទេស។

sections.ux_recommendations: High-contrast golden card section with gradient border, highlighting levels: Master, Bachelor, Associate.

text.kh: ពិនិត្យលក្ខខណ្ឌតម្រូវ

sections.name: Student Life Highlights
sections.objective: Display a visual teaser of self-study areas, dormitory facilities, and campus culture.

headline_example.kh: ជីវិតនិស្សិតដ៏រស់រវើក

content_example.en: Life at AIC extends far beyond lectures. Dive into community development, extracurricular athletic tournaments, and student-run association festivals.
content_example.kh: ជីវិតនៅ AIC គឺលើសពីការសិក្សានៅក្នុងថ្នាក់។ ចូលរួមសកម្មភាពអភិវឌ្ឍន៍សង្គម ព្រឹត្តិការណ៍កីឡា និងសកម្មភាពក្លឹបនិស្សិតជាច្រើន។

sections.ux_recommendations: Grid gallery showcasing historical photos of campuses, graduation days, dormitory settings, and self-study areas.

text.kh: ស្វែងយល់បន្ថែមពីជីវិតនិស្សិត

pages.name: Vision, Mission & Goals

vision.en: AIC will become a leading higher education institution in training human resources with quality, competence, professionalism, and morality to meet the needs of the national and international labor market.
vision.kh: វិទ្យាស្ថានអាស៊ី កម្ពុជា នឹងក្លាយជាគ្រឹះស្ថានឧត្តមសិក្សាឈានមុខគេក្នុងការបណ្តុះបណ្តាលធនធានមនុស្សប្រកបដោយ គុណភាព សមត្ថភាព វិជ្ជាជីវៈ និងសីលធម៌ ដើម្បីឆ្លើយតបទៅនឹងតម្រូវការទីផ្សារការងារជាតិ និងអន្តរជាតិ។

goals.en: Train students to have broad knowledge in both theory and practice.
goals.kh: បណ្តុះបណ្តាលនិស្សិតឱ្យមានចំណេះដឹងទូលំទូលាយ ទាំងទ្រឹស្តី និងការអនុវត្តជាក់ស្តែង។

goals.en: Integrate English and computer skills for students in all majors.
goals.kh: បញ្ជ្រាបចំណេះដឹងផ្នែកភាសាអង់គ្លេស និងកុំព្យូទ័រដល់និស្សិតគ្រប់ជំនាញ។

goals.en: Encourage students to be creative and conduct scientific research.
goals.kh: ជំរុញឱ្យនិស្សិតមានគំនិតច្នៃប្រឌិត និងការស្រាវជ្រាវបែបវិទ្យាសាស្ត្រ។

goals.en: Provide opportunities for students to intern at companies, factories, and enterprises both domestically and internationally.
goals.kh: ផ្តល់ឱកាសដល់និស្សិតក្នុងការចុះកម្មសិក្សានៅតាមបណ្តាក្រុមហ៊ុន រោងចក្រ សហគ្រាស ទាំងក្នុង និងក្រៅប្រទេស។

goals.en: Cultivate a spirit of morality, compassion, leadership, and high responsibility.
goals.kh: បណ្តុះស្មារតីនិស្សិតឱ្យមានសីលធម៌ មេត្តា ករុណា និងភាពជាអ្នកដឹកនាំ ព្រមទាំងការទទួលខុសត្រូវខ្ពស់។

goals.en: Enhance the quality of education and provide efficient and transparent academic services.
goals.kh: លើកកម្ពស់គុណភាពអប់រំ និងផ្តល់សេវាកម្មសិក្សាប្រកបដោយប្រសិទ្ធភាព និងតម្លាភាព។

goals.en: Collaborate with national and international partners to expand education and research potential.
goals.kh: សហការជាមួយដៃគូជាតិ និងអន្តរជាតិ ដើម្បីពង្រីកសក្តានុពលនៃការអប់រំ និងការស្រាវជ្រាវ។

goals.en: Establish a Research and Development Center to support study and work implementation.
goals.kh: បង្កើតមជ្ឈមណ្ឌលស្រាវជ្រាវ និងអភិវឌ្ឍន៍ ដើម្បីគាំទ្រដល់ការសិក្សា និងការអនុវត្តការងារ។

goals.en: Provide employment opportunities to students after graduation.
goals.kh: ផ្តល់ឱកាសការងារដល់និស្សិតបន្ទាប់ពីបញ្ចប់ការសិក្សា។

goals.en: Contribute to national social and economic development through quality human resource training.
goals.kh: រួមចំណែកក្នុងការអភិវឌ្ឍសង្គម និងសេដ្ឋកិច្ចជាតិ តាមរយៈការបណ្តុះបណ្តាលធនធានមនុស្សប្រកបដោយគុណភាព។

pages.suggested_imagery: Inspirational banners showing students inside modern, well-lit lecture halls, interacting with technology.

text.kh: មើលកម្មវិធីសិក្សា

pages.name: Organization Structure
pages.suggested_imagery: Clean, interactive hierarchical chart explaining the leadership reporting lines and department divisions.

text.kh: ជួបក្រុមថ្នាក់ដឹកនាំ

pages.name: Founder & Principal
pages.suggested_imagery: High-quality professional portrait of the founder, accompanied by a signature graphic.

text.kh: អានយុទ្ធសាស្ត្រអភិវឌ្ឍន៍

pages.name: Campus Locations

campuses.name_kh: សាខាភ្នំពេញ
campuses.address_en: Building 12, Street 271, Sangkat Tuek Thla, Khan Sen Sok, Phnom Penh
campuses.address_kh: អាគារលេខ១២ ផ្លូវ២៧១ សង្កាត់ទឹកថ្លា ខណ្ឌសែនសុខ រាជធានីភ្នំពេញ

colleges: College of Business Administration (មហាវិទ្យាល័យគ្រប់គ្រងពាណិជ្ជកម្ម)
College of Law (មហាវិទ្យាល័យនីតិសាស្ត្រ)
College of Arts, Humanities & Foreign Languages (មហាវិទ្យាល័យសិល្បៈ មនុស្សសាស្ត្រ និងភាសាបរទេស)
College of Agriculture (មហាវិទ្យាល័យកសិកម្ម)
College of Science and Technology (មហាវិទ្យាល័យវិទ្យាសាស្ត្រ និងបច្ចេកវិទ្យា)
College of Electrical Engineering and Electronics (មហាវិទ្យាល័យវិស្វកម្មអគ្គិសនី និងអេឡិចត្រូនិច)
College of Civil Engineering (មហាវិទ្យាល័យវិស្វកម្មសំណង់)

hero.title: Dynamic program title (Bachelor of Business Administration in International Business)
hero.subtitle: Accredited multi-year program aiming at global job placement.

program_template_fields.program_overview: Comprehensive introduction, study shifts, entry criteria, degree level, and typical career routes.
program_template_fields.learning_outcomes: List of core capabilities that students acquire upon graduation (moral standards, technology focus, practical skills).
program_template_fields.curriculum_structure: Divided into years and semesters, listing core modules and credits.
program_template_fields.faculty_members: Profile cards of prominent lecturers holding PhD and Master degrees in respective fields.
program_template_fields.internships: Mandatory Semester VII & VIII placement system with monthly stipends of $300-$1000.
program_template_fields.scholarships: 100% tuition coverage for qualifying national examination candidates.
program_template_fields.admission_requirements: High School Certificate (Bac II) or equivalent academic score card, basic language proficiency.
program_template_fields.tuition_fees: $450/year in Phnom Penh campus, $400/year in regional provinces.

faqs.q: Are classes taught in Khmer or English?
faqs.a: International curricula are taught in English; national programs combine Khmer lectures with English textbooks.

step_1.name: Select Major & Campus
step_1.action: Browse the college lists and find the appropriate level (Master, Bachelor, Associate, TVET).

step_2.name: Check Scholarship Eligibility
step_2.action: Determine if you qualify for the 100% fee waiver based on Bac II scores or entry tests.

step_3.name: Prepare Documents
step_3.action: Gather High School diploma, transcripts, 4x6 photos, and national identification cards.

step_4.name: Online or In-Person Submission
step_4.action: Submit files via the Online portal or directly visit one of the 5 campuses.

step_5.name: Interview & Placement
step_5.action: Undergo basic language or aptitude evaluation tests depending on program selection.

campus_life.description: Details about self-study areas, dormitory settings, and local canteen selections.
photo_galleries: Modern computing labs and interactive library spaces
Sports tournaments and charity volunteer events

facilities.self_study: Equipped with high-speed WiFi, research database terminals, and discussion rooms.
facilities.dormitory: Free housing provided to bachelor and master students who meet scholarship criteria, featuring round-the-clock security.
facilities.canteen: Affordable meal choices with strict compliance to hygiene and health guidelines.

international_relations.focus: Promoting global exchange and creating foreign pathways.

academic_exchange.lecturer_exchange: Historical collaborations where international professors deliver guest lectures in Phnom Penh.
academic_exchange.student_exchange: Mobility pathways allowing students to spend semesters abroad in China, Japan, Korea, and Malaysia.

partnerships.asian: Strategic agreements with Chinese, Japanese, and ASEAN universities.
partnerships.european: Exchange channels matching European research programs and funding structures.

research_publications.centers: AIC Research and Development Center hosting multidisciplinary regional projects.
research_publications.journals: AIC Journal of Multidisciplinary Studies, featuring peer-reviewed publications.

publications.title: Socio-Economic Development along the Mekong Basin
publications.author: Dr. Sopheap et al.

news_events.listing: Provides filters by tag (Academics, Scholarships, Social, Admissions, Press Releases) and location.
news_events.gallery: Grid layout allowing sorting of past event picture galleries.

positions.academic: Openings for Lecturers holding Master or Doctorate degrees in IT, Finance, Law, and TEFL.
positions.administrative: Positions in Registrar office, Campus Management, IT Support, and student relations.

careers.process: Online Application -> Resume Screening -> Technical Evaluation / Teaching Demo -> Final Board Panel Interview.

alumni.benefits: Mentorship pathways, alumni campus library access, and professional career service support.

success_stories.name: Chhim Leakhena
success_stories.quote: AIC gave me both the language skills and the internship link to land my dream career.

missing_features: Online Tuition Fee Payment Gateway integration
future_enhancements: Virtual 3D Tour for all 5 regional campuses
